name: Irish Hot Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a buttered, 4-quart casserole, layer the potatoes, onions, and carrots.
2. Season each layer with salt and white pepper to taste.
3. Sprinkle cooked rice over the layers.
4. Add peas with their liquid on top.
5. Pour diluted condensed tomato soup over all ingredients.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for covered 1 hour.
7. Remove the cover, turn the sausages, and bake uncovered for an additional hour.
